name: Gaming Console – Split Layout Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="gc2-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gc2-split" x1="0" y1="0" x2="560" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_LEFT_PANEL"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gc2-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="88" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gc2-price-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PRICE_BG_START"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PRICE_BG_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gc2-img-fade-r" x1="0" y1="0" x2="560" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="60%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START" stop-opacity="1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="gc2-glow1" cx="260" cy="700" r="480" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.12"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="gc2-glow2" cx="820" cy="400" r="300" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" stop-opacity="0.07"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="gc2-img-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="560" height="1350"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: full background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#gc2-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: left panel darker bg -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="560" height="1350" fill="url(#gc2-split)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: atmosphere glows -->
  <ellipse cx="260" cy="700" rx="480" ry="500" fill="url(#gc2-glow1)"/>
  <ellipse cx="820" cy="400" rx="300" ry="280" fill="url(#gc2-glow2)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: diagonal slash divider — the structural centerpiece -->
  <polygon points="480,0 560,0 600,1350 520,1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.08"/>
  <polygon points="500,0 520,0 560,1350 540,1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="520" y1="0" x2="560" y2="1350" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: product image (left panel, clipped) -->
  <g clip-path="url(#gc2-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="0" width="560" height="1350" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 6: image right-edge fade into bg -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="560" height="1350" fill="url(#gc2-img-fade-r)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: subtle horizontal scan lines left panel -->
  <line x1="0" y1="200"  x2="560" y2="200"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.07"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="300"  x2="560" y2="300"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1050" x2="560" y2="1050" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.06"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1150" x2="560" y2="1150" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.05"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: store name top-right -->
  <text x="1042" y="58" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <line x1="580" y1="70" x2="1040" y2="70" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: vertical category label far right -->
  <text x="1062" y="900" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.3" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="6" transform="rotate(90 1062 900)">PLACEHOLDER_CATEGORY_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: badge pill -->
  <rect x="588" y="108" width="168" height="38" rx="6" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="672" y="132" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: giant title — right panel -->
  <text x="1048" y="340"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="152" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1048" y="490" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="152" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 12: accent underline bars -->
  <rect x="588" y="508" width="460" height="4" rx="2" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.9"/>
  <rect x="840" y="508" width="208" height="4" rx="2" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: product subtitle -->
  <text x="588" y="570" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="42" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_NAME</text>

  <!-- LAYER 14: tagline -->
  <text x="588" y="624" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="26" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: spec divider top -->
  <line x1="588" y1="660" x2="1048" y2="660" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 16: spec rows — vertical list -->
  <text x="588" y="708" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="588" y="740" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="588" y1="756" x2="1048" y2="756" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>

  <text x="588" y="800" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="588" y="832" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="588" y1="848" x2="1048" y2="848" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>

  <text x="588" y="892" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="588" y="924" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="588" y1="940" x2="1048" y2="940" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.12"/>

  <text x="588" y="984"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="588" y="1016" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="588" y1="1032" x2="1048" y2="1032" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 17: price band — full width footer -->
  <rect x="0" y="1090" width="1080" height="260" fill="url(#gc2-price-bg)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1090" x2="1080" y2="1090" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 18: price text -->
  <text x="68" y="1152" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="15" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="68" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="80" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 19: price band divider -->
  <line x1="68" y1="1250" x2="1012" y2="1250" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 20: footer text -->
  <text x="68" y="1306" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" fill-opacity="0.2" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 21: CTA button in price band right -->
  <rect x="730" y="1104" width="300" height="88" rx="10" fill="url(#gc2-cta)"/>
  <text x="880" y="1156" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="36" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ON_ACCENT" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="880" y="1182" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="14" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ON_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 22: top accent line -->
  <line x1="0" y1="2" x2="1080" y2="2" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- LAYER 23: bottom accent line -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1348" x2="1080" y2="1348" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- LAYER 24: corner marks -->
  <path d="M0 72 L0 0 L72 0"         fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M1080 72 L1080 0 L1008 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
